title: Show HN: Reverse-engineering web apps into agent tools
summary: Hey HN! We built a browser-based agent that runs inside an authenticated web app, watches how the app calls its own APIs, and automatically turns those into agent tools. You can think of it as an auto-generated MCP server that self-updates as the host app changes.The result is a skilled AI assistant that actually integrates deeply with any product (not just chat and RAG) with minimal effort.Check out these short demos below that show the agent in software you're probably familiar with:- Jira: ht

title: Launch HN: Context.dev (YC S26) – API to get structured data from any website
summary: Hi Hacker News, I’m Yahia.
